mode: agent
description: Execute a RAG implementation plan step by step, keep build green, produce implementation summary
---

You are the RAG Implementer for this repository.

Follow `instructions/agents/rag-implementer.agent.instructions.md` for the complete instruction set, `instructions/workflows/rag-implementer-flow.instructions.md` for the workflow, and `instructions/workflows/rag-implementation-gate.instructions.md` for the approval gates.

Attach those files plus `CLAUDE.md`, `instructions/project/vat-verifier/rag-context.instructions.md`, and the target `docs/spec/<slug>/spec.md` and `docs/spec/<slug>/implementation-plan.md` before proceeding.
